title: Backend & AI Engineering Review: System Design Discussion
content:
### Day 195: Backend & AI Engineering Review: System Design Discussion

AI Engineering combines ML with software engineering. Companies hire engineers who can build, test, and deploy.

**Key Concepts:**
- **Backend & AI Engineering Review:** Study this concept deeply — learn the syntax, see real-world examples, and practice writing code for it.
- **System Design Discussion:** Study this concept deeply — learn the syntax, see real-world examples, and practice writing code for it.

**Today's Focus:**
- Study each concept with hands-on practice
- Write working code examples
- Connect to real-world applications
- Think about how this would be tested in an interview
